prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2GR-FE (3.5L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12 psi boost, 500+ hp), paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission and a Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch (7.25" diameter)

Full custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system by Manta Exhausts (304-grade, equal-length headers, 3.5" straight-pipe with a Valvetronic muffler for backpressure control), terminating in dual 4.5" titanium tips by Burns Stainless

Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 2-way adjustable dampers, custom valving for the Elfin Type 600 chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by SuperPro, paired with Eibach ERS 1200N/mm helper springs and polyamide bump stops
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Rocket Bunny (Pandem), including front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts, all finished in raw 2x2 twill weave

Custom front splitter and rear wing by Voltex (Type 5, 1800mm width, 300mm chord, 3D carbon fiber construction) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated DRS (Drag Reduction System) for high-speed stability

BBS LM-R 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) forged wheels with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear), paired with AP Racing CP8370-1000 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 380mm rotors
